scripts.build:inspector: bun run build && bun run inspector
scripts.pre-commit: bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.deck:ping: source .env && cd demo/dECK && deck gateway ping --konnect-control-plane-name="$DECK_KONNECT_CONTROL_PLANE_NAME" --konnect-addr="https://eu.api.konghq.com" --konnect-token="$DECK_KONNECT_TOKEN"
scripts.deck:sync: source .env && cd demo/dECK && deck gateway sync auth-service.yaml  --konnect-control-plane-name="$DECK_KONNECT_CONTROL_PLANE_NAME" --konnect-addr="https://eu.api.konghq.com" --konnect-token="$DECK_KONNECT_TOKEN"
scripts.deck:diff: source .env && cd demo/dECK && deck gateway diff auth-service.yaml  --konnect-control-plane-name="$DECK_KONNECT_CONTROL_PLANE_NAME" --konnect-addr="https://eu.api.konghq.com" --konnect-token="$DECK_KONNECT_TOKEN"
scripts.deck:dump: source .env && cd demo/dECK && deck gateway dump --konnect-control-plane-name="$DECK_KONNECT_CONTROL_PLANE_NAME" --konnect-addr="https://eu.api.konghq.com" --konnect-token="$DECK_KONNECT_TOKEN" --output-file kong_demo_new.yaml
scripts.deck:reset: source .env && cd demo/dECK && deck gateway sync kong_reset.yaml --konnect-control-plane-name="$DECK_KONNECT_CONTROL_PLANE_NAME" --konnect-addr="https://eu.api.konghq.com" --konnect-token="$DECK_KONNECT_TOKEN"
scripts.deck:validate: source .env && cd demo/dECK && deck gateway validate auth-service.yaml  --konnect-control-plane-name="$DECK_KONNECT_CONTROL_PLANE_NAME" --konnect-addr="https://eu.api.konghq.com" --konnect-token="$DECK_KONNECT_TOKEN"
